"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\express_system.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\express_system.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\express_system.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\G__~1.EXE -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\express_system.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o express_system.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libexpress_system.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\express_system.dir\linkLibs.rsp
